headline: Arbutus Biopharma Corporation (ABUS) Reports Q1 2026 Results
summary: Arbutus Biopharma Corporation (NASDAQ:ABUS) is one of the 10 Most Profitable Small Cap Stocks to Buy. On May 13, 2026, Arbutus Biopharma Corporation (NASDAQ:ABUS) reported Q1 2026 revenue of $179.1 million with estimated license revenue tied to its litigation settlement with Moderna. The company said revenue jumped from $1.8 million a year earlier because of […]
